name: phobos
description: phobos — always-on token-efficiency discipline for Claude Code.

plugins.name: phobos
plugins.description: Always-on efficiency discipline — triage token spend to task size, write minimal correct code, take fewer round-trips, keep context lean, use memory, route to the right tool. Three skills (phobos, phobos-code, phobos-plan) plus guard/state/status hooks.
